```python
import json
from pathlib import Path

base_dir = Path("/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/yfd-agent-consensus/results/agent_consensus_batch/default_run/task_26_ma_convergence_divergence/revised")

agents = ["codex", "claudecode", "openclaw"]
results = {}

for agent in agents:
    ma_file = base_dir / agent / "ma_divergence.txt"
    if ma_file.exists():
        content = ma_file.read_text().strip()
        results[agent] = {
            "exists": True,
            "content": content[:500],  # 前500字符
            "lines": len(content.splitlines()),
            "size": len(content)
        }
    else:
        results[agent] = {"exists": False}

print(json.dumps(results, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
```
